title: HTTP Only Site
description:
The site is only served under HTTP and not HTTPS.

Confidence: Medium

Recommended fix: Configure your web or application server to use SSL (https).

Reference: https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Transport_Layer_Protection_Cheat_Sheet.html
https://letsencrypt.org/
iso27001_control_name: Security testing in development and acceptance
iso27001_description: Security testing processes shall be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.
